Label: iEdison Report Number
Description: Stores the iEdison-assigned Invention Report Number returned when an invention is successfully submitted to iEdison. Used as the key to link all subsequent Patent and Utilization reports.
Notes: Mark as External ID to support upsert from iEdison response. Should be read-only after initial population.

Label: Title Election Status
Description: Bayh-Dole title election status for this technology. Indicates whether the institution has elected to retain title to the federally funded invention.
Notes: Valid values: Draft; Under Evaluation; Elect to Retain Title; Does Not Retain Title; Designated as Unpatented Biological Material or Research Tool; Voided; Transferred

Label: Title Election Date
Description: Date on which the title election decision was made or submitted to iEdison.
Notes: Auto-populated by iEdison on submission for org clients; store the returned value.

Label: Not Elect Title Reason
Description: Reason the institution chose not to retain title to a federally funded invention.
Notes: Valid values: Low Commercial Potential; Non-Patentable (Not Novel); Non-Patentable (Not Useful); Non-Patentable (Obvious); Did Not Yield Expected Results; Budget Limitation; Immature Market; Other

Label: Not Elect Title Other Reason
Description: Custom reason text when Not Elect Title Reason = Other.
Notes: Only required when Not Elect Title Reason = Other.

Label: Federal Employee
Description: Indicates that this inventor is a federal government employee.

Label: Federal Agency
Description: The federal agency the inventor works for. Only relevant if Federal Employee = true.

Label: Primary Reporting Agency
Description: The primary federal agency designated for this inventor's involvement in the invention. Required for iEdison reporting.
Notes: May default to the agency on the associated Funding Agreement if only one funder exists. Consider a picklist of common agencies: NIH, NSF, DOD, DOE, NASA, USDA, etc.

Label: Confirmatory License Execution Date
Description: Date the Confirmatory License was executed with the federal agency. Required when submitting a non-provisional or PCT patent to iEdison.
Notes: Conditional: required for all patent types except PROV.

Label: Bayh-Dole Exception Circumstances
Description: Indicates that this funded invention falls under exceptional circumstances as defined in Bayh-Dole (35 U.S.C. § 202(d)).

Label: iEdison Docket Number
Description: Internal docket/reference number used to identify this invention in iEdison submissions. Separate from the general External Reference field to avoid collision.
Notes: Optional but useful for institutions that use a separate docketing system.

Label: Funding Agreement (new object)
Description: Represents a federal funding agreement (grant or contract) associated with a Technology record. Required to supply the structured fundingAgreements array to iEdison.
Notes: Master-Detail to Technology. Fields: Agency (Text/Picklist), Grant/Contract Number (Text 40), Award Type (Picklist: Prime Award / Sub-Award), Agreement Type (Picklist: Grant / Contract / Cooperative Agreement / Other Funding Agreement). Consider also a Sub-Contract child object.

Label: Small Business Licensee
Description: Indicates that the licensee under this agreement is a small business as defined for iEdison utilization reporting.
Notes: Add to Agreement or Agreement Party object.

Label: Utilization Report (new object)
Description: Annual utilization report submitted to iEdison for a specific fiscal year. Holds year-level reporting data that does not belong on the Technology record.
iEdison Field(s) Covered: reportingYear, latestStageDev, firstCommercialSaleYear, commercializationPlanId, isUSManufacturingRequired1/2/3, notes
Notes: Lookup to Technology. Key fields: Reporting Year (Number 4), Submitted (Checkbox), iEdison Submission Date (Date). This object becomes the parent for annual reporting workflow.

Label: First Commercial Sale Year
Description: The year in which the first commercial sale of a product arising from this invention occurred.
Notes: Required when latestStageDev = Commercialized. Place on Utilization Report object if that object is created.

Label: Commercialisation Plan
Description: Standardised commercialisation plan status for Bayh-Dole annual utilization reporting.
Notes: Valid values: Seeking additional funding; Marketing and/or furthering development; Developing for internal use only; Developing with intent to commercialise; Distribution/licensing for research only; No current commercialisation plan. Required when latestStageDev = Not Licensed or Commercialized.

Label: US Manufacturing Required
Description: Indicates whether a US manufacturing requirement applies under the licence terms (Y / N).
Notes: Maps to iEdison's isUSManufacturingRequired1 field (Y or N).

Label: Licence US Manufacturing Requirement
Description: Indicates whether any licence contains a US manufacturing requirement (Y / N / N/A).

Label: Product US Manufacturing
Description: Indicates whether any product is being manufactured in the US under this licence (Y / N / N/A).
